mapper.select: SELECT FROM clients ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT FROM clients
(name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR wechat_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clients (wechat_id, name, created_at) VALUES (#{wechat_id}, #{name}, NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE clients
wechat_id = #{wechat_id},
name = #{name},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT wechat_id AS wechatId, name FROM clients ORDER BY name
SELECT DISTINCT wechat_id AS wechatId, name FROM clients WHERE wechat_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY name LIMIT 10
